From the original PutnamBench paper (Tsoukalas et al. 2024, NeurIPS'24 D&B track), Table 3: few-shot GPT-4 evaluated via in-context learning at pass@10 on the Lean 4 formalizations, solving 1 of 640 problems (0.16%). Footnote 3 of the paper confirms 'We use GPT-4o for all our evaluations', so the 'GPT-4' rows in Table 3 are GPT-4o. The same paper also reports GPT-4o solving 1/640 in Isabelle and 1/412 in Coq under separate prompting configs; the Lean result is reported here as the canonical PutnamBench figure (matching the methodology of the already-tracked DeepSeek-Prover-V2-671B entry, which also uses the Lean split).
